title: alnus serrulata
intro: Alnus serrulata, also known as the smooth alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The smooth alder has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. The herbal preparations of smooth alder typically include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
